wins: Reaffirmation of $60 billion to $90 billion SAM for 3 hyperscale customers in 2027
R&D investments in 2-nanometer AI XPU packaging and 100-terabit Tomahawk 6 switch
Strong Q1 revenue growth of 25% year-on-year
Positive outlook for Q2 AI revenue growth to $4.4 billion
risks: Non-AI semiconductor revenue is expected to be flattish sequentially
Uncertainty around new regulations impacting AI design wins
Potential delays in reenactment of Section 174 affecting cash taxes
High capital expenditures and debt servicing costs
Dependence on a few key hyperscale customers
